product: Column popularity is now available in the Catalog Explorer ​
tagline: June 1, 2026 Column popularity is now available in the Catalog Explorer UI.
what_it_does: June 1, 2026 Column popularity is now available in the Catalog Explorer UI. To find the most popular columns in a table, go to the table's Overview tab.
why_it_matters: [Anthropic Claude Sonnet 5 now available as a Databricks hosted model]( anthropic claude sonnet 5 now available as a databricks hosted model) [Run a subset of job tasks with their
